description: Take formal dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes are great for those who never compromise on quality. Upper Genuine leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style derby style cut Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Four hole lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Rounded and padded collar for in-step comfort Leather inner lining for breathable comfort Padded fabric footbed for comfortable all-day wear Perforation details at the sides of the shoe Midsole Rubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional and partly textured lugs in the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction Raised and decoupled heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
